name: Petro Stopping Center - El Paso
description: Large full-service Petro/TravelCenters of America on the I-10 corridor in El Paso with fuel lanes, showers, truck service and restaurants.

name: Pilot Travel Center - Van Horn
description: Pilot travel center on the east side of Van Horn with diesel lanes, reservable showers, and overnight truck parking.

name: Chevron Truck Stop - Van Horn
description: Independent Chevron truck stop on the I-10 frontage road at the west end of Van Horn.

name: Chevron - Kent
description: 24-hour Chevron fuel stop at the remote Kent exit, a key refueling point on this stretch of I-10.

name: Flying J Travel Center - Fort Stockton
description: Major Flying J travel center in Fort Stockton with truck parking, showers, a CAT Scale, and quick-service food.

name: Love's Travel Stop - Fort Stockton
description: Love's travel stop in Fort Stockton offering diesel, showers, restrooms, and a convenience store off I-10.

name: Circle Bar Truck Corral - Ozona
description: Long-running independent truck stop in Ozona with a restaurant, motel, truck wash, tire and repair service, showers, and scales.

name: Love's Travel Stop #700
description: Full-service Love's travel stop at I-10 and Loop 467 in Sonora with diesel, showers, a Subway, an on-site CAT Scale and Love's Truck Care.

name: Love's Travel Stop #464
description: Love's travel stop at I-10 Exit 523 in Comfort offering fuel, showers, a McDonald's and Subway, truck care and a CAT Scale.

name: TA Express Junction (formerly Segovia Truck Stop)
description: Independent Segovia truck stop at I-10 Exit 465 near Junction, now operating as a TA Express, with fuel, showers, laundry, a Sonic and Hunt Brothers Pizza.

name: CAT Scale at Love's #464 - Comfort
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Love's Country Store at I-10 Exit 523 in Comfort.

name: CAT Scale at Love's #700 - Sonora
description: Certified CAT Scale on-site at the Love's Travel Stop at I-10 Exit 404 in Sonora.

name: Holmes Wrecker Service
description: 24-hour tire, mechanical and towing/wrecker service serving the I-10 Sonora area near the Love's at Exit 404.
